requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and ChargEV / Malaysia Network Integration
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与ChargEV /马来西亚网络集成
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與ChargEV /馬來西亞網絡集成

summary.en: Malaysia's public EV charging network — led by ChargEV, operated by TNB Electron (a subsidiary of Tenaga Nasional Berhad) — uses OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) as the back-office communication standard for networked public chargers. OCPP compliance enables remote monitoring, fault notification, access-control management, billing integration, and load management across the ChargEV network and compatible charge-point operators (CPOs). Network-connected chargers in Malaysia are typically required by CPOs, site owners, or project tenders to support OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 for smart-charging and back-office integration. The Suruhanjaya Tenaga EV charging guidelines also reference interoperability requirements for networked equipment. EMC compliance under MS IEC 61000 and IEC 61851-21-2 (off-board EV supply equipment EMC) is required for type-approval and regulatory acceptance.
summary.zh: 马来西亚公共电动汽车充电网络——以ChargEV为主，由TNB Electron（国家能源公司子公司）运营——采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）作为联网公共充电桩的后台通信标准。OCPP合规性支持ChargEV网络和兼容充电点运营商（CPO）的远程监控、故障通知、访问控制管理、计费集成和负载管理。马来西亚联网充电桩通常被CPO、场地方或项目招标要求支持OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1，以实现智能充电和后台集成。能源委员会EV充电指引亦涉及联网设备的互操作要求。MS IEC 61000及IEC 61851-21-2（非车载EVSE的EMC要求）的EMC合规性是型式批准和监管验收的前提。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞公共電動汽車充電網絡——以ChargEV為主，由TNB Electron（國家能源公司子公司）運營——採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）作為聯網公共充電樁的後台通訊標準。OCPP合規性支持ChargEV網絡和兼容充電點運營商（CPO）的遠程監控、故障通知、訪問控制管理、計費集成和負載管理。馬來西亞聯網充電樁通常被CPO、場地方或項目招標要求支持OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1，以實現智能充電和後台集成。能源委員會EV充電指引亦涉及聯網設備的互操作要求。MS IEC 61000及IEC 61851-21-2（非車載EVSE的EMC要求）的EMC合規性是型式批准和監管驗收的前提。

standards_or_laws: OCPP 1.6 / OCPP 2.0.1 (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
ChargEV network technical and interoperability requirements (TNB Electron)
IEC 61851-21-2:2021 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-2: EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
Suruhanjaya Tenaga EV Charging Equipment and Installation Guideline — networked equipment provisions

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack still uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 and OCPP-integrated systems. EMC evidence produced to GB/T 17626 series requirements may not fully satisfy IEC 61851-21-2 requirements without a clause-level gap review.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系统所要求的PP/CP信号。依据GB/T 17626系列要求提供的EMC证据，在未完成逐条差距审查的情况下可能无法充分满足IEC 61851-21-2要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系統所要求的PP/CP信號。依據GB/T 17626系列要求提供的EMC證據，在未完成逐條差距審查的情況下可能無法充分滿足IEC 61851-21-2要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 17626 series — China EMC test standards

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by ChargEV, the intended CPO, or the project tender (typically OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1); (2) back-office API integration and site commissioning testing are completed before network activation; (3) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (4) remote monitoring, fault-reporting, and load-management functions meet ChargEV or CPO platform requirements; (5) IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence is produced from an accredited laboratory for Malaysia ST CoA and SIRIM purposes. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP back-office implementation cannot be activated on Malaysia's public ChargEV network.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持ChargEV、目标CPO或项目招标所要求的OCPP版本（通常为OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1）；(2) 在网络激活前完成后台API集成和现场调试测试；(3) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(4) 远程监控、故障报告和负载管理功能符合ChargEV或CPO平台要求；(5) 由认可实验室出具IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据，供马来西亚ST CoA和SIRIM使用。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP后台实现的充电桩无法在马来西亚公共ChargEV网络上激活。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持ChargEV、目標CPO或項目招標所要求的OCPP版本（通常為OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1）；(2) 在網絡激活前完成後台API集成和現場調試測試；(3) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(4) 遠程監控、故障報告和負載管理功能符合ChargEV或CPO平台要求；(5) 由認可實驗室出具IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據，供馬來西亞ST CoA和SIRIM使用。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP後台實現的充電樁無法在馬來西亞公共ChargEV網絡上激活。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for networked public chargers on ChargEV and Malaysia CPO networks; OCPP integration is a network-activation condition; IEC 61851-21-2 EMC compliance is required for ST CoA type-approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for Malaysia CPO network integration; GB/T 17626 EMC evidence may not satisfy IEC 61851-21-2 without supplementary testing

source.publisher: Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB) — ChargEV network operator

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration is a network-activation requirement for public chargers in Malaysia, not an optional feature. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot be activated on Malaysia's ChargEV public network without firmware and communication-stack redesign. IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence from an accredited laboratory is required for ST CoA type-approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与OCPP后台集成是马来西亚公共充电桩网络激活的必要条件，而非可选功能。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法在马来西亚公共ChargEV网络上激活。ST CoA型式批准要求认可实验室出具IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與OCPP後台集成是馬來西亞公共充電樁網絡激活的必要條件，而非可選功能。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法在馬來西亞公共ChargEV網絡上激活。ST CoA型式批准要求認可實驗室出具IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據。
